The pattern and proportion of various body components like body water, muscle mass, bone and fat increase during the entire childhood and adolescence to reach adult values by about 18 years. Adolescent girls are at greater physiological stress than boys because of menstruation. Their nutritional needs are of particular importance as they have to prepare for motherhood. All these rapid anabolic changes require more nutrients per unit body weight. Well-formulated balanced diets for children and adolescents help optimum growth and boosts their immunity /c125 Growing children and adolescents require more calcium.
